sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Viasat AMARA chosen to power Jetstar’s long haul Wi-Fi
feed.summary: Viasat Inc. announced that Jetstar Airways has selected Viasat AMARA, its next-generation in-flight connectivity (IFC) solution, to equip its upgraded Boeing 787 Dreamliner fleet. This system will be installed on 11 Jetstar aircraft to provide fast and reliable in-flight internet for long and ultra-long-haul missions. The solution is part of Jetstar's cabin modernization program, with installations already underway and expected to continue through mid-2027.

feed.title: Wabtec Q1 2026 slides: double-digit growth, raised guidance
feed.summary: Wabtec (NYSE: WAB) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with adjusted EPS of $2.71 beating estimates and revenue of $2.95 billion slightly missing forecasts. The company demonstrated double-digit sales growth, expanded operating margins across both Freight and Transit segments, and increased its full-year 2026 guidance for revenue and adjusted EPS. Strategic acquisitions and a growing backlog contributed to the positive outlook, despite continued headwinds from tariffs and rising raw material costs.

feed.title: Wex Inc stock hits 52-week high at 180.98 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Wex Inc. (WEX) stock climbed to a 52-week high of $180.98, marking a 43.15% total return over the last year. This surge is attributed to a favorable market environment and strategic initiatives, with analysts revising earnings upwards for the upcoming period, expecting EPS to more than double in fiscal 2026. Despite strong Q4 2025 results surpassing Wall Street estimates, broader market concerns had previously led to a premarket dip in shares.

feed.title: Vodafone Stock Climbs As Google Cloud Partnership Boosts AI Strategy
feed.summary: Vodafone Group (NASDAQ:VOD) shares rose following the expansion of its AI and cybersecurity solutions for small businesses through a partnership with Alphabet Inc's (NASDAQ:GOOGL) Google Cloud. New offerings include a managed detection and response (MDR) service and the Vodafone Business AI Concierge, built with Google Gemini, designed to enhance customer interactions. This collaboration builds on their existing $1 billion, 10-year partnership aimed at accelerating digital transformation.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Has Lowered Expectations for Equifax (NYSE:EFX) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Equifax (NYSE:EFX) from $240.00 to $230.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment comes despite Equifax beating Q1 earnings estimates, attributing growth to AI-driven product innovation and cloud adoption. However, management issued cautious Q2 and full-year guidance due to mortgage and macro risks, leading to a mixed analyst sentiment and recent insider selling.

feed.title: Delta to suspend RDU to Las Vegas route for summer
feed.summary: Delta Airlines will temporarily suspend its flights between Raleigh Durham International Airport (RDU) and Las Vegas (LAS) starting June 2, with service expected to resume on September 8. The airline cites "routine network planning" for the summer season as the reason for this and other flight changes, including suspensions from Detroit to Sacramento and JFK to Houston, Memphis, and St. Louis.

feed.title: Citigroup Lowers Equifax (NYSE:EFX) Price Target to $238.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Equifax (NYSE:EFX) from $256.00 to $238.00 but maintained a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 23.70% from its previous close. This adjustment follows Equifax's Q1 earnings report, which beat EPS and revenue expectations, driven by AI and cloud advancements, despite cautious guidance from management regarding mortgage and macro risks. Analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" for the credit services provider, with an average price target of $231.00.

feed.title: Chubb (NYSE:CB) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
feed.summary: Chubb (NYSE:CB) reported better-than-expected Q1 CY2026 results, with revenue up 11.9% to $15.3 billion and non-GAAP profit exceeding analyst estimates by 3.2%. While net premiums earned and EPS surpassed expectations, book value per share narrowly missed forecasts. The company highlighted its strong, diversified business and underwriting discipline despite elevated uncertainty.

feed.title: Keefe Bruyette cuts Washington Trust Bancorp stock price target on loan pressures
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reduced its price target for Washington Trust Bancorp (NASDAQ:WASH) to $32 from $34 due to loan pressures, while maintaining a Market Perform rating. The bank missed earnings expectations, reporting $0.66 per share, leading to a significant stock drop and an elevated provision for loan losses. Despite near-term challenges, the company offers a 7.47% dividend yield and has maintained payments for 43 consecutive years.

feed.title: Is a Deeper Dive Into AI What American Express Needs to Accelerate Growth?
feed.summary: American Express (AXP) is set to report Q1 2026 earnings, with focus on its recent acquisition of AI expense management startup Hyper and its broader AI strategy amidst weakening consumer sentiment. The company aims to accelerate next-gen AI capabilities while maintaining its streak of double-digit net card fee revenue growth. The quarter will be crucial in determining if these AI investments translate into accelerated revenue and margin discipline, especially given persistent macro uncertainties.

feed.title: Chipotle to open new Genesee County location this month
feed.summary: A new Chipotle Mexican Grill is set to open before the end of April in Fenton, Genesee County, at 3401 Owen Road. The new location is replacing 2941 Mediterranean Street Food and will operate seven days a week. Chipotle is actively hiring for about 30 positions, offering competitive benefits including a crew bonus and a debt-free college degree program.

feed.title: WD Raises the Bar on Sustainable Infrastructure as AI Storage Demand Accelerates
feed.summary: Western Digital (WD) released its FY2025 Annual Sustainability Report, highlighting its efforts to provide sustainable and cost-efficient infrastructure for the AI-driven data economy. The report emphasizes WD's progress in decarbonization, circularity, and responsible business practices, crucial as AI accelerates data generation and storage demands. WD is focusing on increasing storage density, improving energy efficiency, and recovering rare earth materials to minimize environmental impact and support customer sustainability goals.

feed.title: Werner® Expands Intermodal Assets in Mexico, Providing Capacity for Cross-border Shippers
feed.summary: Werner Enterprises is expanding its intermodal capacity in Mexico by deploying 53-foot containers, with 400 already in use and another 400 planned for 2026. This initiative aims to provide reliable and efficient cross-border shipping options, starting in Monterrey and Silao. The service emphasizes security, local expertise, cost efficiency, and sustainability for Mexican businesses.

feed.title: Northern Trust broadens automation for account changes, cuts manual work
feed.summary: Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) has expanded its collaboration with Saphyre to enhance automated workflows for Investment Operations Outsourcing (IOO) clients, covering the entire account lifecycle. This partnership aims to reduce manual effort, strengthen operational governance, and improve efficiency for complex account changes and transitions. The solution centralizes workflows to ensure data consistency and faster execution of time-sensitive events, ultimately benefiting client service outcomes.

feed.title: Verizon to report first-quarter earnings on April 27, 2026
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE, Nasdaq: VZ) will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on Monday, April 27, 2026. The company will host a webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET to present the results, with related materials available from 7:00 a.m. ET on Verizon's Investor Relations website. This announcement highlights Verizon's financial reporting schedule and provides background on the company's operations and 2025 revenues of $138.2 billion.

feed.title: Old hard drives yielded 90% rare earth capture in Western Digital pilot
feed.summary: Western Digital released its FY2025 Annual Sustainability Report, highlighting efforts to integrate sustainability into AI storage infrastructure. Key achievements include a 66% renewable energy usage across global sites and a significant reduction in emissions intensity from product use. The company also pioneered an Advanced Recovery and Rare Earth Material Capture Program, achieving a 90% rare earth capture rate from obsolete hard drives.

feed.title: Verizon posts Q1 results April 27; webcast starts at 8:30 ET
feed.summary: Verizon (NYSE: VZ) will report its first-quarter 2026 earnings on Monday, April 27, 2026, with a webcast scheduled to begin at 8:30 a.m. ET. Financial materials, including the press release and financial tables, will be made available at 7:00 a.m. ET on Verizon's Investor Relations website. The company reported full-year 2025 revenue of $138.2 billion.

feed.title: Citigroup (C-PN) offers 10‑year autocal lable notes tied to SPXF3EV6 index — $1,000 par
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. is offering 10-year autocallable notes linked to the S&P 500 Futures 35% Edge Volatility 6% Decrement Index (USD) ER, with a $1,000 principal amount. These notes do not pay interest and may automatically redeem early with a premium if the underlying index meets certain conditions. Investors face downside exposure at maturity if the index falls below 60% of its initial value, as the index is high-risk due to leveraged futures exposure and a 6% annual decrement.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Dow to $33 From $32, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has increased its price target for Dow Inc. (DOW) to $33 from $32, while maintaining an "In Line" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Dow, with some raising price targets and others maintaining their current ratings. The article also provides a brief company profile, financial data points, and mentions upcoming earnings release for Q1 2026.

feed.title: CoStar: Retail rent growth slows to 1.9% in Q1
feed.summary: Retail asking rent growth in the U.S. decelerated to 1.9% year-over-year in Q1 2026, marking a continuation of a downward trend since 2024. This moderation reflects a normalization of retail fundamentals after a post-pandemic boom, with landlords facing increased tenant resistance due to rising occupancy costs and stable sales growth. While growth rates have slowed in many major markets, some Midwestern cities are bucking the trend with stronger gains.

feed.title: Westgate Las Vegas’ SuperBook to be operated by Caesars Entertainment
feed.summary: The SuperBook at Westgate Las Vegas will soon be operated by Caesars Entertainment, pending approval by the Nevada Gaming Commission. This partnership aims to enhance the sports wagering experience by integrating Caesars' sports betting platform and expanding wagering options, including Same Game Parlays and live in-play betting. Caesars Digital President Eric Hession stated that this collaboration will combine a legendary sportsbook environment with a modern betting menu.

feed.title: Best Buy CEO Corie Barry to step down
feed.summary: Best Buy has announced that CEO Corie Barry will step down after seven years, with long-time executive Jason Bonfig succeeding her on October 31. Bonfig, currently the chief customer, product, and fulfillment officer, is expected to lead the company through evolving consumer demands and heightened competition, focusing on profitability initiatives like Best Buy Ads and an online marketplace. Barry will remain in an advisory role for six months to ensure a smooth transition.

feed.title: Teledyne Technologies Reports First Quarter Results
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) announced record first-quarter sales, non-GAAP diluted earnings per share, and operating margin for 2026. The company reported net sales of $1,560.1 million, a 7.6% increase year-over-year, and non-GAAP diluted earnings per share of $5.80, up 17.2%. Teledyne also raised its full-year 2026 GAAP and non-GAAP diluted earnings per share outlooks, citing strong performance particularly in its Digital Imaging segment.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Upgrades Airbnb to Overweight With a $178 Target: Is the Business Inflection Point Finally Here?
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has upgraded Airbnb (ABNB) from Equal Weight to Overweight, raising its price target to $178, citing a "significant business inflection" with accelerating growth and expanding margins for the company. This upgrade is driven by strong Q4 2025 Gross Booking Value growth and positive Q1 2026 revenue guidance, supported by innovations like AI-powered customer support and new revenue streams from sponsored listings. The analyst believes

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) director updates trust holdings and deferred share credits
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity director Thomas W. Palmer reported updated holdings, primarily related to board compensation rather than market trades. The disclosure includes indirect ownership of 770 Class A common shares via his revocable trust and the acquisition of 39.475 Directors' Deferred Compensation Share Credits. These share credits, valued at $253.63 each, bring his total to 15,627.056, representing a right to receive Class A shares upon the end of his board service.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Equifax to $230 From $240, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has revised its price target for Equifax (EFX) downwards to $230 from $240, while reaffirming an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Equifax, with some maintaining and others reducing their price targets, and varying ratings from Outperform to Neutral and Buy. The article notes that access to the full details of this specific announcement from Wells Fargo is reserved for members.

feed.title: Goldman Names Raman as Head of Alternatives Capital Markets
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. has appointed Akila Raman as the global head of its private and alternatives capital markets business. In this new role, Raman will be responsible for leading capital raising, structuring, and distribution within the alternatives asset class. She has been with Goldman Sachs since 2004, rising to managing director in 2015 and partner in 2018.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Tyler Technologies PT to $450 From $500, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has adjusted its price target for Tyler Technologies (TYL) to $450 from $500, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst target changes for Tyler Technologies, including BTIG setting a target of $420 and NorthCoast Research at $430, both maintaining Buy ratings. The article also notes recent insider transactions and a $200 million share repurchase plan by Tyler Technologies.

feed.title: Micron Technology Inc Stock (MU) Opened Up by 4.37% on Apr 22: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Micron Technology Inc (MU) stock surged by 4.37% on April 22, driven by robust demand for its High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) products, which are sold out through 2026, and strong fiscal Q3 earnings guidance. Analysts largely maintained "Buy" ratings, citing the AI memory super-cycle, despite some concerns about insider selling and capital expenditures. The company's strategic position in the AI market is considered the dominant factor influencing its performance.

feed.title: J&J's Imaavy demonstrates long-term disease control in myasthenia gravis
feed.summary: New Phase 3 data for Johnson & Johnson's (JNJ) Imaavy (nipocalimab) in generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) patients showed sustained clinical improvements and reductions in total immunoglobulin G (IgG). The study involved 120 weeks of observation, with positive results noted at 96 weeks.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Otis Worldwide Q1 2026 misses EPS, beats revenue
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide reported mixed Q1 2026 results, with EPS slightly missing expectations at $0.89 against a forecast of $0.90, while revenue beat forecasts at $3.6 billion, driven by strong service segment growth. Despite the revenue beat, the company's stock fell by 2.87% in pre-market trading due to profitability concerns and margin pressures. The company is implementing strategies to address these challenges, including micro-pricing and cost reduction, expecting service margins to improve sequentially and return to year-over-year expansion by the end of 2026.

feed.title: Duke Energy Foundation announces first round of America250 grants to strengthen and protect South Carolina green spaces – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: The Duke Energy Foundation is investing $275,000 in South Carolina through its America250 initiative to strengthen green spaces, support tree planting, and maintain trails, coinciding with Earth Day and the nation's upcoming 250th anniversary. This first round of funding benefits 11 nonprofit organizations and reinforces environmental stewardship. The broader initiative will see over $1 million invested across six states in projects recognizing America's 250th anniversary.

feed.title: $275,000 will fund South Carolina trees, trails and parks
feed.summary: The Duke Energy Foundation announced a first round of $275,000 in America250 grants to support green spaces in South Carolina, including tree planting, trail maintenance, park revitalization, and litter prevention. This is part of a larger commitment exceeding $550,000 for the state and over $1 million across six states. Eleven South Carolina organizations received awards, with additional grants for other initiatives to be announced later this spring.

feed.title: Dow's 312-Point Rally Highlighted By Gains For Shares Of UnitedHealth, Caterpillar
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a 312-point rally. This significant rise was primarily driven by strong performances from UnitedHealth and Caterpillar, whose share gains significantly contributed to the overall market increase.

feed.title: WISeKey’s SEALCOIN Launches “Spacedrop” for the Machine-driven Economy
feed.summary: WISeKey's subsidiary, SEALCOIN AG, has launched "Spacedrop," an early-access onboarding initiative for its machine-to-machine economy ecosystem. Spacedrop aims to introduce users to SEALCOIN's real infrastructure, which combines hardware-based identity, satellite connectivity, and Hedera’s decentralized ledger technology, rather than engaging in speculative Web3 airdrops. The program emphasizes building understanding of the platform's secure, autonomous interactions between devices, with QAIT as its native settlement token, and incorporates post-quantum cryptography.

feed.title: Applied Materials Stock Outlook: What a $439 Price Target Means
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) is projected to reach a stock price of $439 per share by late 2028, implying an 11% total return or 4% annualized, driven by continued semiconductor demand and AI-related growth. The valuation model assumes 7% annual revenue growth, 30% operating margins, and a 33x P/E multiple. The company's focus on AI semiconductor buildout and strategic partnerships are key contributors to its positive outlook, though challenges like China export curbs could introduce sensitivity.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (NASDAQ: ERIE) director adds deferred share credits, holds 295 shares
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity director Brian Arden Hudson Sr. reported an update to his equity holdings, including 295 direct Class A common shares and an additional 39.475 Directors' Deferred Compensation Share Credits. These share credits, priced at $253.6300 each, bring his total deferred share credits to 3,345.293, representing future Class A common shares to be received upon the end of his board service, with no exercisable or expiration dates. The filing is compensation-related and does not indicate open-market buying or selling activities.

feed.title: Danaher Stock Is Down 19% In the Past 3 Months. Could DHR Reach $248?
feed.summary: Danaher (DHR) stock has seen a 19% decline in the past three months, but its recent Q1 2026 earnings report showed signs of recovery with a 3.5% revenue increase and raised full-year EPS guidance. A valuation model, assuming moderate growth, strong margins, and a normalized P/E, projects DHR could reach $248 per share by late 2028, representing a 27% total return from its current price of $195. Key factors include improving bioprocessing demand, the integration of the Masimo acquisition, and consistent cash generation.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Cuts Clorox (NYSE:CLX) Price Target to $110.00
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for Clorox (NYSE:CLX) to $110 from $136, maintaining an "equal weight" rating and implying a 10.5% potential upside. This adjustment follows Clorox missing its quarterly EPS estimates and experiencing a slight revenue decline. The consensus among analysts is cautious, with an average target of $111.33 and a "Reduce" rating.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Lifts Price Target on Corteva to $89 From $86, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has increased its price target for Corteva (CTVA) to $89 from $86 while maintaining an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the analyst firm regarding the agricultural chemical company's future performance. The article also mentions other recent analyst actions on Corteva, including adjustments by Wells Fargo, Mizuho, Goldman Sachs, and UBS.

feed.title: RBC Capital raises Sherwin-Williams stock price target on pricing power By Investing.com
feed.summary: RBC Capital has increased its price target for Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) to $391 from $376, maintaining an Outperform rating, due to the company's continued market share gains, strong pricing power, and share repurchase strategy. Despite potential raw material inflation in Q2, the firm anticipates Sherwin-Williams will be able to implement price increases. The new price target is based on 34 times fiscal 2026 estimated earnings per share.

feed.title: ERIE (ERIE) director boosts deferred compensation share credits, updates trust holding
feed.summary: ERIE Indemnity director Charles Scott Hartz updated his equity holdings, reporting an indirect holding of 1,097.427 Class A common shares via a Delaware Trust. Additionally, he recorded 39.475 Directors' Deferred Compensation Share Credits at $253.63 per share, which grant the right to receive Class A common shares upon his board service termination. These transactions, filed as a Form 4, are categorized as neutral in filing impact and sentiment, with no open-market purchases or sales.

feed.title: 12 Best Costco Food Finds For Under $5
feed.summary: This article identifies 12 Costco food items that can be purchased for under $5, highlighting the challenge of finding such deals in a bulk-oriented store. It details various products, from spices and bread to milk and the famous rotisserie chicken and food court hot dog, emphasizing their value, quality, and sometimes surprising benefits. The author provides a methodology based on personal shopping experience and customer reviews to help bargain-hunting Costco members.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Adjusts Price Target on Northern Trust to $157 From $146, Maintains Underperform Rating
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has updated its price target for Northern Trust (NTRS) to $157, an increase from its previous target of $146. Despite this adjustment, the firm has chosen to maintain its "Underperform" rating on the stock. This news comes amidst several other analyst adjustments for Northern Trust on the same day.

feed.title: VFS Stock Climbs As VinFast Racks Up Record EV Growth
feed.summary: VinFast Auto Ltd. (VFS) stock climbed over 12% following record EV deliveries in 2025 and a strategic shift towards cost reduction. The company delivered approximately 197,000 EVs in 2025, generating $3.6 billion in revenue, and aims for 300,000 deliveries in 2026. This growth, coupled with strong domestic performance in Vietnam and expanding product lines like e-scooters, has led Wedbush to reiterate an Outperform rating with a $6 target.

feed.title: WD-40 deploys AI in supply chain, business processes
feed.summary: WD-40 is integrating artificial intelligence into its supply chain and business operations using platforms like Microsoft Dynamics 365, Salesforce, and John Galt Solutions' Atlas system. This initiative aims to enhance efficiency and decision-making, with the CEO emphasizing a focus on rethinking processes beyond just personal efficiency. The company acknowledges that future success will increasingly rely on skilled workers in AI and related technologies.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) director reports new deferred share credits and indirect holdings
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity director Thomas B. Hagen reported updated holdings, including 39.475 new Directors' Deferred Compensation Share Credits valued at $253.63 each, bringing his total deferred credits to 14,378.256 units. The filing mainly details indirect ownership through an estate, a family limited partnership, and irrevocable trusts, where Hagen shares investment and voting powers. No open-market buys or sells were reported, and the update clarifies the convertibility of Class B to Class A shares.

feed.title: Elevance Health Reports Q1 2026 Results: Full Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Elevance Health exceeded first-quarter expectations with adjusted diluted EPS of $12.58, driven by favorable claims, ACA seasonality, and non-recurring investment income. The company raised its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to at least $26.75 and anticipates at least 12% adjusted EPS growth in 2027. Strategic efforts include integrating AI for member engagement and cost management, and advancing its integrated whole health approach through Carelon, which has shown success in reducing hospital readmissions and generating savings.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Q1 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide reported a 1% increase in total organic sales for Q1 2026, driven by a 5% growth in its service segment, with maintenance and repair sales increasing by 4% and modernization orders up by 11%. The company announced a 5% increase in its quarterly dividend and completed $400 million in share repurchases, reflecting its commitment to returning cash to shareholders. Despite challenges in China, Otis Worldwide saw a strong demand in the Americas with orders growing more than 20%, contributing to a backlog approaching $20 billion, and expects net sales of $15.1 to $15.3 billion for 2026.

feed.title: Lamb Weston Releases Latest Global Sustainability Report
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. has released its latest Global Sustainability Report for fiscal year 2025, detailing progress toward its 2033 sustainability goals. The report highlights achievements in employee and community support, food quality and safety, and environmental stewardship, including reductions in injury rates and freshwater use, and increased recycling. Sylvia Wilks, chief supply chain officer, emphasized the company's commitment to measurable, value-driven sustainability efforts for its business, customers, and team members.
